intent: B2B buyers comparing hex dumbbells for gyms, wholesale programs, OEM branding, packaging, and shipment planning.
evidence: Existing site has a commercial dumbbell guide but no dedicated commercial hex dumbbell buying guide.
Seed competitor set covers dumbbell and commercial gym equipment categories; live SERP API evidence is required before final publication.

intent: Importers and gym equipment brands looking for a factory supplier for bumper plates and Olympic plates.
targetMarket: United States, Germany, France, Middle East
evidence: Existing weight plate guide explains plate differences but does not fully cover manufacturer/OEM supplier intent.
Product data contains weight plate products that can support internal links from a stronger manufacturer page.
